items.a: Not in this v1 static launch build. The structure is ready so billing can be connected later without reorganizing the site.

items.q: Do I need a backend right now?
items.a: No. This version is intentionally lean: public pages, member pages, product page, legal pages, and shared assets.

items.q: Can more apps be added later?
items.a: Yes. Add a new folder under apps/, update data/apps.json, and the shared pages can scale from there.
